_draft: Clinical content is a DRAFT skeleton — review and polish before forwarding externally.
synthesis: Routine check-in. BP 122/78, HbA1c trending down. Patient asymptomatic and adherent. No coordinator follow-up needed.

turns.content: Hi Linda, this is Vardana. Your BP this morning was 122 over 78 and your last HbA1c came back at 6.7%, which is down from 7.1 in February. Nice work. How are you feeling today?
turns.synthesis_snapshot: Opening greeting. Vitals at goal, A1c improving.

turns.content: Feeling really good. The walking group has been a game changer.
That's wonderful — the numbers show it. Any side effects from the Metformin or Lisinopril we should talk about?
turns.synthesis_snapshot: Patient reports feeling well. Screening for med side effects.

turns.content: No, none. I take them with breakfast and dinner like you suggested.
Perfect. I'll let your coordinator know you're tracking well. Keep going — you're doing the work.
turns.synthesis_snapshot: Routine check-in. BP 122/78, HbA1c trending down. Patient asymptomatic and adherent. No coordinator follow-up needed.
